subject: Wi-Fi shows connected but no internet
description: Menu bar shows Wi-Fi connected; browser and Teams fail to reach the internet.

ts_steps.title: Verify other devices
ts_steps.action: Confirm phone or second laptop on same SSID reaches internet to rule out outage vs single machine.

ts_steps.title: Renew DHCP and DNS
ts_steps.action: System Settings → Network → Wi-Fi → Details → TCP/IP — Renew DHCP Lease. DNS: try 1.1.1.1 or 8.8.8.8 temporarily for test only.

ts_steps.title: Remove and re-add Wi-Fi
ts_steps.action: Forget network, reconnect with correct credentials; check for captive portal in browser.

internal_information: DHCP/DNS stale lease, captive portal, or VPN split-tunnel oddities. Corporate networks may need NOC if wide outage.
